allow: PowerShell($extract = "C:\\Users\\Patrik\\Studio GoodLook\\_source"; if \(!\(Test-Path $extract\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $extract -Force | Out-Null }; Expand-Archive -Path "C:\\Users\\Patrik\\Pictures\\Salon.zip" -DestinationPath $extract -Force; Get-ChildItem -Path $extract -Recurse | Format-Table FullName, Length -AutoSize | Out-String)
